name: Blueberry Buckle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together half of the margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and spices (cardamom, nutmeg).
5. Alternately add milk and the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking dish.
7. Scatter blueberries over the batter.
8. In another bowl, mix remaining sugar, flour, cardamom, and nutmeg. Add the remaining margarine and cut until crumbly.
9. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the blueberries.
10. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Allow to cool slightly before serving with ice cream, if desired.
